Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x990A "MISSIONGENOCIDE-1000-990A" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mission Genocide.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $1000 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly.
Note: as the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $9277.
The loading screen is from the Amstrad CPC version
